message:
test(pipeline): add dry run tests for executor functions

Add comprehensive tests for pipeline executor in dry run mode:
- Run_DryRun: basic sequential workflow execution
- Run_DryRun_WithVariables: variable substitution
- Run_DryRun_WithConditional: conditional step execution
- Resume_DryRun: workflow resume functionality
- Resume_NilState: error handling for nil state
- sendNotification: notifier callback testing
- selectPane_DryRun: pane selection dry run path
- Run_DryRun_ProgressEvents: progress event emission

Fixed bug: selectPane() was missing dry run mode check that
selectPaneExcluding() already had, preventing sequential workflow
testing without live tmux.

Coverage improvement: 60.5% → 66.1%
- sendNotification: 0% → 100%
- Resume: 0% → 63.9%
- selectPane: 0% → 5.4%
- Run: improved to 78.3%

Ref: ntm-m5y3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
